subjects.description: warm steaming cup of coffee on a wooden table
subjects.appearance_details: classic ceramic cup with a slight curved rim, dark coffee surface, thin rising steam, soft highlights on glaze, and a small shadow on the wood
subjects.relationship: main cozy still-life subject beside the open book
subjects.location: foreground on a light wooden table near the window glow
subjects.relative_size: small tabletop object, dominant in close still-life framing
subjects.orientation: cup upright, rim visible from a slightly elevated angle
subjects.pose: still cup with moving steam rising vertically then curling
subjects.action: releases warm steam that curls through sunlight above the tabletop
subjects.state_changes: steam thickens in the light; coffee surface trembles subtly; highlights shift as the camera moves
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: smooth ceramic glaze, dark liquid surface, translucent steam, and warm reflected light
subjects.facial_features: curved rim, cup handle, and circular coffee surface

subjects.description: open hardcover book with a deep blue cover
subjects.appearance_details: book lying face up, slightly creased pages, deep blue hardcover visible at the edges, fine paper texture, and relaxed open spine
subjects.relationship: quiet reading companion placed beside the coffee
subjects.location: foreground to midground on the same wooden table, beside the cup
subjects.relative_size: larger than the cup but lower and flatter in frame
subjects.orientation: open pages facing upward, angled slightly across the table grain
subjects.pose: resting open with pages lightly curved
subjects.action: pages lift faintly at the edges in a soft indoor draft while sunlight crosses the paper
subjects.state_changes: page edges flutter lightly; sunlight shifts across the open spread; paper texture becomes more visible
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: matte blue cover, cream paper, small creases, and fibrous page texture
subjects.facial_features: open spine, page edges, and blank readable texture without visible text

subjects.description: sunlit window and warm room shadows
subjects.appearance_details: simple elegant window frame, soft sunlight entering the room, gentle shadows across the table, and faint out-of-focus interior details
subjects.relationship: lighting and background element shaping the cozy atmosphere
subjects.relative_size: large background frame compared with the tabletop objects
subjects.orientation: vertical window frame casting diagonal light onto the table
subjects.action: filters sunlight into the room and casts soft shifting shadows over coffee and book
subjects.state_changes: sunbeam becomes more visible through steam; table shadows drift subtly; background glow warms the scene
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: painted window frame, glass glow, soft dust motes, and warm room surfaces
subjects.facial_features: simple vertical and horizontal window lines

background_setting: A quiet cozy room with a wooden table beside an elegant window, soft sunlight, a steaming ceramic coffee cup, an open hardcover book with a deep blue cover, and gentle shadows across warm wood.

lighting.conditions: Soft sunlight filtered through the window, warm highlights on ceramic and wood, visible steam in the sunbeam, and gentle low-contrast room shadows.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Soft sunlight filtered through the window, warm highlights on ceramic and wood, visible steam in the sunbeam, and gentle low-contrast room shadows.

aesthetics.composition: Cozy reading atmosphere, warm still life, tactile wood and paper textures, quiet morning or afternoon calm, and simple refined composition.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Cozy reading atmosphere, warm still life, tactile wood and paper textures, quiet morning or afternoon calm, and simple refined composition.

cinematography.camera_motion: Close tabletop still-life shot from a slightly elevated angle, shallow depth of field, slow push in, and delicate focus on steam, cup rim, and book pages.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Natural cinematic realism with warm sunlight, soft shadows, and intimate tabletop detail.
context: A fresh cup of coffee steams beside an open blue hardcover book on a wooden table, lit by sunlight from a nearby window.

actions.description: The camera opens on the steaming coffee cup and open blue hardcover book resting on the wooden table.
Steam curls through the window sunlight while soft shadows stretch across the pages and wood grain.
A page edge flutters slightly and the camera settles into a warm close view of cup, book, and sunlit table.

segments.description: Establish the cozy tabletop with coffee, open book, wooden surface, and window light.
segments.key_changes: Steam becomes visible and the book cover color anchors the composition.
segments.camera: Close slightly elevated still-life shot with slow push in.

segments.description: Focus on steam curling upward through sunlight while shadows and wood grain become clearer.
segments.key_changes: Steam movement intensifies, sunlight glows through it, and page texture sharpens.
segments.camera: Gentle macro push with shallow depth of field on cup rim and steam.

segments.description: Hold the calm reading scene as a page edge flutters and warm light settles over the table.
segments.key_changes: Motion softens to steam, tiny page flutter, and drifting shadows.
segments.camera: Stable close hold with slight rack focus from coffee to open book.

temporal_caption: A steaming ceramic cup of coffee sits beside an open blue hardcover book on a sunlit wooden table in a cozy room.
audio_description: Quiet room tone, faint steam hiss, soft page flutter, distant outdoor ambience through the window, and subtle wooden room warmth.
